calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2023 Off Calendar

Request For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-21-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Request For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Suzanne R Bolanos; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:56 p.m. pausing at 2:58 p.m. resuming at 3:00 p.m. and concluding at 3:13 p.m.

Plaintiff Financial Pacific Leasing Inc. appearing represented by Mark Erikson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Roman Orlov DBA Castle Builders Co. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JESSICA BAILEY is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Financial Pacific Leasing Inc., and against Defendant Roman Orlov DBA Castle Builders Co., as follows:

1. Damages: $37,970.16
2. Prejudgment Interest: $6,574.23
3. Attorney fees: $2,825.00
4. Costs: $648.60

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $48,017.99

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Continued To Sep-06-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-25-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To May-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:36:36 a.m., pausing at 09:45:49 a.m., reconvening at 10:47:08 a.m., and concluding at 10:56:03 a.m.

Plaintiff Financial Pacific Leasing, Inc. represented by Stephanie J. Schier, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Roman Orlov DBA Castle Builders Co. not appearing.

This matter was previously continued for the Court's review of Plaintiff's request for damages.

JESSICA BAILEY is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court determines that the Declaration of Shelley Williams filed Feb-16-2023 has no exhibits attached. There is no evidence of the fair market value of equipment, the amount due and outstanding at the time of breach, nor evidence of anything paid on the account. Additionally, declaration of attorney fees is not sufficient.

Court orders matter continued to May-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505. Plaintiff shall file and submit courtesy copies to Dept. 505 an Account Ledger identifying the outstanding amount due at time of breach, Supplemental Declaration re: Attorney's Fees, missing exhibits, and evidence of the fair market value of equipment.

Plaintiff's witness must have personal knowledge of breach or perform as the custodian of records.
